_comment: XL Fitness AI — Model version registry. Weights are NOT in git. Download from Google Drive or deploy via scp to Pi.
_pipeline: Mac Mini trains in PyTorch → export ONNX → scp to Pi → Pi runs onnxruntime

activity._description: 8-class gym activity classifier. The main 'brain' — replaces rule-based counting. Softmax output = one state at a time (the gate).
activity._architecture: LSTM(51→128) → Dropout(0.3) → Linear(128→64) → ReLU → Linear(64→8) → softmax

versions.description: Angle threshold state machine — baseline, no ML
versions.notes: Current live system on all Pis

versions.description: Fast MLP for < 500 samples — stepping stone before LSTM
versions.notes: Train with train/train_model.py once 60+ samples collected

versions.description: Full LSTM — target model. Requires 300+ annotated segments.
versions.notes: Train with train/train_pytorch.py. Retrains automatically using Pi review clips.

face_id._description: Member identification via ArcFace embeddings. Runs InsightFace buffalo_sc on Pi.
face_id._output: 512-dim embedding vector — cosine similarity match against member registry
face_id._architecture: InsightFace buffalo_sc (pre-trained ArcFace — not retrained by us)

versions.description: InsightFace buffalo_sc — fast, accurate for 4–50 member gym
versions.notes: Downloaded automatically by insightface. Enrol members via face/enroll_member.py

pose_detection._description: Person detection + keypoint extraction. Runs on Hailo NPU.
pose_detection._output: Bounding boxes + 17 COCO keypoints per person

versions.description: YOLOv11n-pose — nano model, runs at 30fps on Hailo
versions.notes: .pt auto-downloaded by ultralytics. Convert to .hef for Hailo via hailo_model_zoo.

weight_verifier._description: Confirms the weight stack actually moved during a rep. Prevents phantom reps.
weight_verifier._input: ROI crop of weight stack (video frames during rep)
weight_verifier._architecture: Dense optical flow (Farneback) — deterministic, no ML

versions.description: Farneback optical flow on weight stack ROI
versions.notes: Implemented in pi/weight_tracker.py. Calibrate WEIGHT_STACK_ROI in config.py.

review_loop._description: Closed-loop retraining pipeline — Pi flags uncertain clips, human annotates, Mac Mini retrains.
flow: Pi runs ONNX → confidence < 0.50 → clip_reporter.py saves 30-frame window
Human sets 'true_class' in _meta.json via GitHub web UI or local checkout
Mac Mini runs: python3 train/train_pytorch.py --review data/review/
scp new model to Pi, restart pi/main.py — accuracy improves
